macro.title: Iran Crisis
macro.body: The Iran crisis could lead to increased oil prices, affecting the global economy. This might impact the portfolio's energy holdings, such as ENB.TO.
macro.bull: A resolution to the crisis could lead to decreased oil prices, benefiting the portfolio's energy holdings.
macro.base: The crisis continues, leading to stable oil prices, with minimal impact on the portfolio.
macro.bear: The crisis escalates, leading to increased oil prices, negatively impacting the portfolio's energy holdings.

macro.title: NATO Summit
macro.body: The NATO summit might lead to increased tensions between the US and other countries, affecting the global economy and the portfolio's holdings.
macro.bull: The summit leads to increased cooperation, benefiting the portfolio's holdings, such as MSFT and AAPL.
macro.base: The summit has minimal impact on the portfolio.
macro.bear: The summit leads to increased tensions, negatively impacting the portfolio's holdings.

macro.title: US Economy
macro.body: The US economy's performance might affect the portfolio's holdings, particularly those with exposure to the US market, such as NVDA and TSLA.
macro.bull: The US economy grows, benefiting the portfolio's holdings.
macro.base: The US economy remains stable, with minimal impact on the portfolio.
macro.bear: The US economy declines, negatively impacting the portfolio's holdings.

risks.title: Leverage Risk
risks.context: 49% of the portfolio is invested in leveraged ETFs (~$135K CAD)
risks.body: The portfolio's leverage might amplify losses if the market declines.

risks.title: FX Risk
risks.context: 68% of the portfolio is invested in USD (~$180K CAD)
risks.body: The portfolio's FX exposure might lead to losses if the CAD strengthens against the USD.

risks.title: Concentration Risk
risks.context: The portfolio has a diversified mix of holdings across various sectors
risks.body: The portfolio's diversification might reduce the risk of significant losses due to any one holding.

news.headline: NVIDIA Earnings
news.body: NVIDIA's earnings might impact the portfolio's NVDA holding.

outcomes.label: Bull
outcomes.scenario: NVIDIA's earnings beat expectations, increasing the stock price.

outcomes.label: Base
outcomes.scenario: NVIDIA's earnings meet expectations, with minimal impact on the stock price.

outcomes.label: Bear
outcomes.scenario: NVIDIA's earnings miss expectations, decreasing the stock price.

news.headline: Tesla Deliveries
news.body: Tesla's delivery numbers might impact the portfolio's TSLA holding.

outcomes.label: Bull
outcomes.scenario: Tesla's delivery numbers exceed expectations, increasing the stock price.

outcomes.label: Base
outcomes.scenario: Tesla's delivery numbers meet expectations, with minimal impact on the stock price.

outcomes.label: Bear
outcomes.scenario: Tesla's delivery numbers miss expectations, decreasing the stock price.

news.headline: Visa Threat Intelligence
news.body: Visa's threat intelligence might impact the portfolio's V holding.

outcomes.label: Bull
outcomes.scenario: Visa's threat intelligence leads to increased adoption, increasing the stock price.

outcomes.label: Base
outcomes.scenario: Visa's threat intelligence has minimal impact on the stock price.

outcomes.label: Bear
outcomes.scenario: Visa's threat intelligence leads to decreased adoption, decreasing the stock price.

picks.thesis: Amazon's growing presence in the tech industry, particularly with its Leo internet service, makes it an attractive addition to the portfolio.
Google's dominance in the tech industry and its growing presence in AI make it a potential addition to the portfolio.
picks.entry: Monitor for entry on a pullback to $2,500-$2,800

picks.thesis: Alibaba's growing presence in the e-commerce industry and its potential for growth make it a speculative addition to the portfolio.

strengths.text: The portfolio's diversification across various sectors reduces the risk of significant losses due to any one holding.
The portfolio's leverage might amplify gains if the market increases.
The portfolio's tax-efficient structure, with most holdings in RRSP or Investment accounts, minimizes tax liabilities.
The portfolio's long-term focus allows for riding out market fluctuations.
The portfolio's regular contributions, including the upcoming October bonus, will continue to grow the portfolio's value.

concerns.text: The portfolio's leverage might amplify losses if the market declines.
The portfolio's FX exposure might lead to losses if the CAD strengthens against the USD.
The portfolio's concentration in the tech sector might increase the risk of significant losses if the sector experiences a downturn.
The portfolio's lack of diversification in the bond market might increase the risk of significant losses if the stock market experiences a downturn.
The portfolio's non-resident status in 2026 might lead to tax implications that need to be carefully managed.

strategy_short.text: Monitor the portfolio's leverage and adjust as needed to maintain an optimal risk profile.
Consider rebalancing the portfolio to maintain the target asset allocation.
Keep an eye on the CAD/USD exchange rate and adjust the portfolio's FX exposure as needed.

strategy_mid.text: Continue to contribute to the portfolio regularly, including the upcoming October bonus.
Consider adding more diversification to the portfolio, such as bonds or real estate.
Monitor the portfolio's tax efficiency and make adjustments as needed to minimize tax liabilities.

strategy_long.text: Maintain a long-term focus and avoid making emotional decisions based on short-term market fluctuations.
Continue to educate oneself on personal finance and investing to make informed decisions.
Review and adjust the portfolio's asset allocation as needed to ensure it remains aligned with the investor's goals and risk tolerance.

daily_outlook: The portfolio's outlook remains neutral, with a focus on monitoring the market and adjusting the portfolio as needed to maintain an optimal risk profile.
